items: Implementation Plan for the Facilities Master Plan — Board direction on priorities, phasing, and funding for Measure S bond projects. Discussion: project prioritization (modernization vs safety vs design), guiding principles (equity, capacity, condition, student outcomes), community engagement, operational/educational impact, long-term sustainability. Prepared by VPCS (Nick Olsen, Eric Van Pelt), reviewed by Martin Cervantes (Interim Bond Director), Rick Edson (CBO)

items.intro_words: Good evening. Uh tonight's stud session is focused on the facility's master plan
